prompt: Generate a steampunk-style high-speed train that fuses the sleek, aerodynamic design of a modern high-speed train in the first image with the industrial aesthetic of an old steam train in the second image. The resulting train is a retro-futuristic marvel, with a streamlined chassis from the first image crafted from polished brass and copper, adorned with intricate engravings and exposed gears. The train races along elevated iron tracks through a misty steampunk cityscape at dusk, with smokestacks and airships faintly visible in the background, lit by a warm, golden glow.
prompt_refined: Generate a photorealistic image of a steampunk-style high-speed train. This train should seamlessly fuse the sleek, aerodynamic design and streamlined chassis exemplified in image 1 with the robust, industrial aesthetic and complex machinery details found in image 2. The train's exterior should be crafted from highly polished brass and copper, featuring intricate Victorian-era engravings and prominently exposed gears and pipes, evoking a retro-futuristic appearance. The train is depicted racing at high speed along elevated iron tracks, cutting through a misty steampunk cityscape at dusk. In the background, tall smokestacks and airships are faintly visible amidst the haze, all illuminated by a warm, golden glow.
